system.powerDescription:
Venom flows from your fingertips. For the rest of the scene you may dissolve mundane objects with a touch. You may dissolve a total amount of objects equal to CAT size before you lose the use of this power. Alternatively, you may inject the totality of this venom into a living creature, immediately ending this power and rolling PSYCHE for damage. You gain +1D for each "yes" answer. 

• Does the target believe you are an ally? 
• Is your hand over the target's heart?
